texts.label: text
texts.orig: Drinks are charged extra and are paid directly to the camp at check out.
texts.text: Drinks are charged extra and are paid directly to the camp at check out.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are quoted in Kenya shillings & USD.
texts.text: Rates are quoted in Kenya shillings & USD.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are on Full Board and are inclusive of all applicable taxes, levies, and service charge.
texts.text: Rates are on Full Board and are inclusive of all applicable taxes, levies, and service charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children below 3 years sharing with parents are not charged.
texts.text: Children below 3 years sharing with parents are not charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Children between 3 to 12 years sharing with parents are charged 50% of the adult rate and 75% of room rate in their own room.
texts.text: Children between 3 to 12 years sharing with parents are charged 50% of the adult rate and 75% of room rate in their own room.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 30 days prior to date of arrival 25% of the room rate is charged.
texts.text: 30 days prior to date of arrival 25% of the room rate is charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 14 days prior to the date of arrival 50% of the room rate is charged.
texts.text: 14 days prior to the date of arrival 50% of the room rate is charged.

texts.text: 7 days prior to the date of arrival 75% of the room rate is charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: PAYMENT POLICY I. A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due on collection of client(s) accommodation voucher 45 DAYS prior to arrival of the client(s) at the Camp. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification. II. From time to time, Orng'atuny Mara King Camp may require that the Tour FACILITATOR to make a deposit for large or special groups. III. Should the Tour FACILITATOR fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the Tour FACILITATOR shall pay a three percent (3%) per month (compounded) Late Payment Fee.
texts.text: PAYMENT POLICY I. A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance is due on collection of client(s) accommodation voucher 45 DAYS prior to arrival of the client(s) at the Camp. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification. II. From time to time, Orng'atuny Mara King Camp may require that the Tour FACILITATOR to make a deposit for large or special groups. III. Should the Tour FACILITATOR fail to pay any invoice within the agreed time, the Tour FACILITATOR shall pay a three percent (3%) per month (compounded) Late Payment Fee.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: CONFIDENTIALITY :  The TOUR FACILITATOR confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: CONFIDENTIALITY :  The TOUR FACILITATOR confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential to the undersigned and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: VARIATION :  The  contractual  rates  mentioned  in  this  agreement  are  subject  to  change, however every effort will be made to maintain them. In the event of a change in Government Taxes or Levies affecting the rates mentioned herein, Orng'atuny Mara reserves the right t o pass on any increases to the TOUR FACILITATOR.

texts.orig: LIABILITY :  Orng'atuny Mara King Camp does not and will not accept responsibility for any incident  of  any  nature  involving  any  client(s)  who  is/are  at  any  property(ies),  nor  while travelling to or from any property(ies).
